exclusivity.memo: Xfanicブランドでの日本販売は不可。6ヶ月独占はMOQ5000・$52・30%前払いの条件提示→未合意。OEM/自社ブランド路線へ切替
exclusivity.chatExcerpt:
Please kindly note that we are only a manufacturer. Do not sell products under the brand Xfanic in the Japanese market.

Regarding exclusive sales rights for six months: this arrangement would impact our overall sales for a full year. Therefore, our minimum order quantity is 5000 pieces with unit price $52, which needs to be placed in one single order. A 30% prepayment of the total order amount is required.

---
We are ODM/OEM Manufaturer and unable to accept a half-year exclusive sales arrangement without a set MOQ, as we have to procure materials based on large minimum order quantities.

moq.memo: クラファン段階MOQゼロは未合意。提示: 5000@$52(独占) / 1000@$52(ロゴOEM) / 800@$53.6 / 500@$55.2。サンプル$60・1個限定。要約はメモ、全文は下のトーク抜粋
moq.chatExcerpt:
【メール全文アーカイブ — Tracy Zeng / Xfanic / SmartView Dock 5019D】

--- 最新 (2026/6/29頃) ---
Hi Hiroki,
Thanks so much for sharing the cost status!
I'm happy to let you know that I've sent the samples via DHL, and they are estimated to arrive by July 2.
WAYBILL 69 2142 4646
I've also attached the software installation package for you. If you run into any issues or have any questions at all, please don't hesitate to reach out to me on WeChat at 13430524698.
(Another installation package for windows system cannot be uploaded to email, will it be possible to send via wechat?)
Best Regards, Tracy

--- Wise送金 (2026/6/29 Hiroki) ---
I have already completed the bank transfer procedure through Wise.
Shenzhen Xfanic Technology Co., Ltd is expected to receive the USD payment by Thursday, July 2 at 14:03.

--- MOQ交渉 (2026/6/16 Tracy) ---
Our minimum order quantity for units printed with your custom logo is 1,000 pieces:
1. MOQ 1K: USD$52 (w/o PKG), with custom logo printing
2. MOQ 800pcs: USD$53.6 (w/o PKG), no custom logo
3. MOQ 500pcs: USD$55.2 (w/o PKG), no custom logo
For options 2 and 3, combined orders with other customers' purchase orders will be required.

--- MOQ初回提示 (2026/6/15 Tracy) ---
MOQ for OEM production with our own logo: 1K
Unit price based on the MOQ: USD$52 (Valid for one month)
Lead time for production: Around 55 Days
Whether sample production with our logo is possible: Sample materials are all ready for assembly, these are not possible for adding logo since screen is made of Glasses.

--- 独占初回提示 (2026/6/9 Tracy) ---
minimum order quantity is 5000 pieces with unit price $52, which needs to be placed in one single order. A 30% prepayment of the total order amount is required.

--- クラファンMOQゼロ要請 (2026/6/9 Hiroki) ---
Would it be possible to support us with no MOQ requirement during the crowdfunding stage only?

--- 展示会後 (2026/6/2 Tracy) ---
本日午前、弊社ブースへご来訪いただき誠にありがとうございました。
添付ファイルに製品資料を送付いたします。
Tracy Zeng / SHENZHEN XFANIC TECHNOLOGY CO.,LTD
https://www.xfanic.cn/

certification.memo: ソフトウェアインストールパッケージ送付済み。Windows版はWeChat経由希望。PSE等は未確認

price.chatExcerpt:
1.MOQ 1K: USD$52(w/o PKG), with custom logo printing
2.MOQ 800pcs: USD$53.6(w/o PKG), no custom logo
3.MOQ 500pcs: USD$55.2(w/o PKG), no custom logo

First-run samples are ready, with stock limited to under 10 pieces. Only one sample unit is available per request, priced at USD 60 each.
